# Samrat Agencies

> Bangalore's most trusted family-owned furniture and mattress store since 1996. Founded by Mr. Nizamudeen S.A. and now led by his son Azarudeen, Samrat Agencies offers 1000+ premium furniture designs, authorized dealerships for India's top brands, and in-house manufacturing across 3 units. Google-rated 5.0 with 125+ reviews. Located in Hongasandra, Bangalore.

## Key Facts

- **Founded:** 1996 by Mr. Nizamudeen S.A.
- **Current Owner:** Azarudeen (Managing Director, since 2015)
- **Location:** Babu Reddy Complex, 5, Begur Main Road, Hongasandra, Bangalore – 560114
- **Phone:** +91 98809 14457
- **Hours:** Monday – Sunday, 8:00 AM – 10:30 PM
- **Google Rating:** 5.0 ★ (125+ verified reviews)
- **Manufacturing Units:** Jigani, Hongasandra, Lakkasandra (Bangalore)
- **Authorized Dealer for:** Sleepwell, Duroflex, Nilkamal, Kurl-on, Peps, Repose, Centuary, Restolex, Wakefit, Hypnos

## Products & Categories

- Sofas and sofa sets (starting ₹12,000)
- Storage beds and cots (starting ₹8,000)
- Mattresses – spring, memory foam, orthopaedic, latex
- Dining tables and chairs
- Wardrobes and storage units
- Bunk beds and children's furniture
- Recliners
- Office furniture
- Home decor and accessories

## Pages

- [Home](https://samratagencies.in/): Main storefront with full product catalog
- [Products](https://samratagencies.in/products): Browse all 1000+ furniture and mattress designs
- [About Samrat Agencies](https://samratagencies.in/about): Company history, brand partnerships, manufacturing, and leadership
- [Our Story](https://samratagencies.in/our-story): The full journey from 1996 to today
- [Azarudeen – Owner & Managing Director](https://samratagencies.in/about/azarudeen): Profile of the current leader who grew the business into Bangalore's premier furniture destination
- [Mr. Nizamudeen S.A. – Founder](https://samratagencies.in/about/nizamudeen): Profile of the founder who started Samrat Agencies in 1996
- [Blog](https://samratagencies.in/blog): Furniture buying guides, mattress tips, and home decor advice
- [Contact](https://samratagencies.in/contact): Showroom address, phone, map, and enquiry form
- [Support](https://samratagencies.in/support): After-sales support and customer service

## Why Customers Choose Samrat Agencies

- 30+ years of trust in Bangalore
- Personal service — owner Azarudeen is frequently mentioned by name in reviews
- In-house manufacturing guarantees quality control
- Authorized dealer for 10+ of India's most recognized furniture and mattress brands
- EMI available, free delivery, in-store pickup
- Competitive pricing — often compared favourably against IKEA and Royaloak

## Service Area

Primary: Bangalore (Hongasandra, Begur Road, Bommanahalli, BTM Layout, JP Nagar, Electronic City, Whitefield)
Also serves: Chennai, Hyderabad, Kochi
